title: paraquilegia gangotriana
intro: Paraquilegia gangotriana, also known as Himalayan or Indian Spurge Flower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Paraquilegia gangotriana include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, while also possessing antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and decoctions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
